title: 2 Axis / Combo Charts
excerpt: I’ve been looking for a way to set up a secondary axis chart but as yet have not been able to see if this possible or an available option. Am I missing something obvious or is this not actually possible on dashboards at …

posts.author: rgblp (Riley Beament)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve been looking for a way to set up a secondary axis chart but as yet have not been able to see if this possible or an available option. Am I missing something obvious or is this not actually possible on dashboards at the moment? Combo charts would also be useful.

posts.author: LaurentConroux (Laurent Conroux)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi rgblp,
It can be done as an App if you need it.
I made one as a demo and it looked like this:

Capture du 2020-07-31 11-19-05820×558 22.8 KB

posts.author: rgblp (Riley Beament)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Laurent

Thank you very much for the pointer here. I’ll set out some time to do the same with the app builder.
